title: LIFE-XP TP
description: The pack for LIFE-XP: Full Edition to translated a lot mod
body:
This resource pack was created especially for our server and brings a unique atmosphere to the game.
With it, you’ll get:

* 🎨 **Custom TAB design** — the server logo is displayed in the player list.
* 🪄 **Animated totems** — every member has their own personalized animation.
* 🌍 **Translated mods** — all mods in the pack are translated into Russian for better immersion.
* ⚙️ **Full compatibility** — carefully adjusted for the modpack, with no conflicts.

## 🔧 Compatibility

* Minecraft version: *1.21.x*
* Recommended for use with the server’s official modpack.

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Move it into the `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it in the Minecraft resource packs menu.
